en.extract:
The Roviana rail (Gallirallus rovianae) is a species of bird in the family Rallidae. It is endemic to the Western Province (Solomon Islands). The species has sometimes been placed in the genus Hypotaenidia.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, and plantations .

The '''Roviana rail''' ('''''Gallirallus rovianae''''') is a species of bird in the family [[Rallidae]]. It is [[endemic]] to the [[Western Province (Solomon Islands)]].<ref>{{cite journal|last1=Diamond|first1=Jared|title=A new species of rail from the Solomon Islands and convergent evolution of insular flightlessness|journal=The Auk|date=1991|volume=108|issue=3|pages=461–470|url=https://sora.unm.edu/sites/default/files/journals/auk/v108n03/p0461-p0470.pdf|doi=10.2307/4088088|jstor=4088088}}</ref> The species has sometimes been placed in the genus ''Hypotaenidia''.

Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, and plantations .
